subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is mighty and bountiful unto him who hath believed in God, the Single One, the All-Informed, that he may be intoxicated with its wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن عزیز کریم الی الذی آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر لیاخذه سکر خمر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
